zh.lifeSummary: 當James Leveson於大約1502年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾普雷斯特武德時，他的父親Richard Leveson46歲，母親Hilary Willenhall42歲。他於大約1508年與Alice Wrottesley結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1529年住在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克。他去世於1545年11月12日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲沃爾維哈普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Leveson于大约1502年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾普雷斯特武德时，他的父亲Richard Leveson46岁，母亲Hilary Willenhall42岁。他于大约1508年与Alice Wrottesley结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1529年住在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克。他去世于1545年11月12日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲沃爾維哈普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Leveson was born about 1502, in Prestwood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Leveson, was 46 and his mother, Hilary Willenhall, was 42. He married Alice Wrottesley about 1508. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Warwick, Warwickshire, England in 1529. He died on 12 November 1545, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Wolverhampton, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Leveson est né environ 1502, à Prestwood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Leveson, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Hilary Willenhall, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wrottesley environ 1508. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre en 1529. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1545, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Wolverhampton, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Leveson um 1502 in Prestwood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Leveson 46 und seine Mutter Hilary Willenhall 42. Er hat um 1508 Alice Wrottesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1529 hat er in Warwick, Warwickshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 12. November 1545 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wolverhampton, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Leveson è nato il circa 1502 nel Prestwood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Leveson, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Hilary Willenhall, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Alice Wrottesley circa 1508. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Warwick, Warwickshire, England nel 1529. Morì il 12 novembre 1545, nel Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Wolverhampton, West Midlands, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Levesonが約1502年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアプレストウッドで生まれた時，父Richard Levesonは46歳，母Hilary Willenhallは42歳であった。約1508年にAlice Wrottesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年にはイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックに住んでいた。彼は1545年11月12日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズウオルバーハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Leveson(이)가 대략 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 프레스트우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Leveson(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Hilary Willenhall(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1508년 Alice Wrottesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1529년도에 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 살았다. 그는 1545년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 울버함프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Leveson nasceu aproximadamente 1502, em Prestwood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Leveson, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Hilary Willenhall, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Wrottesley aproximadamente 1508. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra em 1529. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1545, em Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Wolverhampton, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Leveson родился около 1502 г. в местности прествуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Leveson было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Hilary Willenhall, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wrottesley около 1508 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в 1529 году. Он умер 12 ноября 1545 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности волвирамптон, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Wrottesley aproximadamente 1508. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra en 1529. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1545, en Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Wolverhampton, West Midlands, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
